data: DOW 10 demo tier (AAPL, MSFT, JPM, JNJ, V), 2023-01-01 to 2025-01-01, yfinance Close price, window=5, 80/20 chronological split
limitations: Simulator-only results (cqlib StatevectorSimulator), NOT real quantum hardware. QRC uses 4 qubits which limits reservoir state dimension. Nonlinear feature augmentation (squares + input mean) is essential for competitive performance. Per-sample statevector simulation is slower than classic RC (~14x). QRC advantage is stock-dependent: significant on JPM/V, absent on AAPL/MSFT/JNJ; results carry seed-to-seed variance (RMSE_std) reported per stock.
